royalroad_trending.title: Old Republic: Overlord
royalroad_trending.synopsis: A burnt-out IT manager from future Earth dies mid-click and awakens in the Old Republic era inside the shell of a Sith medical droid, stranded on a warship balanced between victory and annihilation. In a galaxy ruled by Force dynasties, slavery, and endless cycles of war, he discovers that his mind can read systems like living code, predict outcomes, and exploit the hidden machinery beneath power itself. What begins as a desperate struggle to survive as expendable property becomes something far more dangerous: a methodical campaign to steal forbidden knowledge, master body design and essence transfer, and forge a new existence beyond the limits of both man and machine. But as he rises from hidden survivor to myth, ruler, and anomaly, the galaxy itself begins to react, because he is no longer merely defying Sith and Jedi, but pushing against the deeper cycle of reality itself.

royalroad_trending.title: Another World: Building an Empire from Zero（Kingdom Building；Military；LitRPG；Ruthless MC；Isekai）
royalroad_trending.synopsis: The 450th year of the Dark Age. Deep winter. Humanity is losing the war. To the brutal, green-skinned Orcs, humans are nothing more than slaves and livestock. Soren, a former Special Forces drill instructor in his past life, wakes up in the body of a lowly recruit in the Silver Moon Kingdom’s Red Moon Knights. His current situation? Abandoned at the very edge of the frontline: The Misty Swamp. It’s a death trap of toxic miasma, treacherous bogs, and magical beasts. His only assets are twenty-five demoralized, half-starved recruits. His enemy? The Orcish Alliance—a hundred-thousand-strong horde backed by shamanic magic and heavy siege engines. To make matters worse, the kingdom’s corrupt nobles are secretly colluding with the enemy, and his so-called allies are just waiting to stab him in the back. It is an absolute dead-end. A guaranteed game over. But then Soren awakens the [Warlord System]. Stripping away the naive, outdated chivalry of this era, he introduces this brutal fantasy world to something far more terrifying: modern Special Forces physical conditioning, ironclad discipline, and asymmetric warfare. No troops? He recruits rebellious peasants, wrongfully exiled criminals, gladiators on death row, and even the vassal Goblins that the Orcs use as emergency rations. Under his banner, they are forged into warriors. No gear or logistics? Night raids, poison, and ambushes become his bread and butter. He hijacks the Orcs' supply lines, builds his own foundries, and cultivates high-yield, blight-resistant crops to feed his growing army. No talent? With the System's ability to perceive hidden potentials, he unearths diamonds in the rough: a peerless sharpshooter, an ascetic monk possessing iron-body arts, a vengeful mage commander... All drawn to his cause. When the Orcish Alliance finally realizes something is wrong and dispatches an army to crush this minor nuisance... they are met with absolute horror. They aren't facing a ragged band of stragglers. They are facing a heavily fortified stronghold bristling with trebuchets and heavy repeating crossbows. Waiting for them are heavy infantry capable of crushing Orcs in melee; highly mobile Wolf Riders; a disciplined Phalanx of pikemen; longbowmen who can pierce heavy armor... and artillery-like mages unleashing elemental fury! Soren's goal is no longer just surviving the Orcish Alliance. His eyes are set on the conquest of the entire continent of Ayresia. What to Expect: Kingdom Building & Management: Building a territory from absolute zero. Absorbing multi-race refugees with a detailed focus on logistics, agricultural development, and climbing the tech tree. Army Progression: Deep tactical troop compositions (Phalanxes, Longbowmen, Repeating Crossbows, Wolf Riders, Scouts) combined with brutal, modern military training regimens. Ruthless, Pragmatic MC: A highly intelligent protagonist who calculates every move. No naive mercy or pacifism. He uses terrain, psychological warfare, and spec-ops tactics to win against overwhelming odds. Talent Scouting: Uncovering hidden gems in the rough and assembling an all-star roster of generals and specialists. Grimdark, Low-Magic Combat: Visceral, bloody cold-weapon clashes where formations, morale, and supply lines matter just as much as individual strength. System as a Tool: A System element that acts as an analytical and progression aid rather than an overpowered, hand-holding crutch.

royalroad_trending.title: Vulture Heroes, Smoking Swordsman [Self-Destructive Cultivation/Wuxia]
royalroad_trending.synopsis: "The wuxia/xianxia stories on RoyalRoad that can compare to this level of quality can be counted on one hand." - Fran A mad hermit finally figured out how to cultivate smoke in the lungs into demonic Qi, took five steps out of the cave where he wrote the scripture upon the walls and instantly died. A beggar transcribed it poorly, giving everyone who practiced it 'as written' heart palpitations and stomach ulcers. He got rich though, selling it on every street corner- there was moveable block type in the Song Dynasty. An illiterate drug dealer asked his drunk friend to read it to him, but the drunk friend slurred and said "Xu Huo" instead of "Xin Huo"- the Fire of Exhaustion, not the Fire of the Heart. And because of that error, within an error, within an error... it worked. WHAT TO EXPECT: A subversive "Wuxia++", not full-on Xianxia cosmic level planet shattering, but power levels that go beyond a straight Wuxia, that builds on the lore of (in a transformative, critical and satirical way so I don't get sued) the most beloved Wuxia series ever written in the entire Chinese speaking world, that is about: A drug dealer who transforms smoke in his lungs into Demonic Qi, A drunken Shaolin Monk who actually drinks to enhance his drunken boxing among other Shaolin Arts, A virginal courtesan with a haunted flute-blade that can send out sonic wind cutting attacks, And a degenerate gambler with three Demonic Dice carved from the bones of an evil cultivator embedded in his knuckles. Four vices, four Vulture Heroes. Oh! And there's totally a LitRPG-ish Balatro style unlockables system too. NOTE: That being said, if you want to keep it that way, don't, I repeat, don't uncover the spoiler tags in the bottom author's note that re-translates the Chinese dialogue.

royalroad_trending.title: Kurnia Chronicles: How I met My Party [Shark Yuri, Action, TRPG]
royalroad_trending.synopsis: Ella wished for the 'Best friend she could ever have'. She got a shark. Shortly after hopping onto a train for the very first time, Ella's life plan went up in flames. The magical school she was going to attend? Shut. Her savings? Inadequate. Her chances of surviving the night by herself? Slim to none. Fortunately this isn't a solo adventure. She has friends. Amantia, the gunslinging witch. Alba, the cybernetically enhanced were-shark. Karina, the fairy druid with her luchador tyrannosaurus companion Hercules. Ella's role? Blaster caster. Surviving the night is one thing, but even a full party might not be enough for what's coming. As coincidence follows coincidence, fate has anything but a normal life in store for Ella. Hired as security for the world's biggest arms deal, there are abyssal plots afoot that could wipe all that hard earned progress from the face of Kurnia. What you can expect: A fantasy setting that has escaped stasis with the rise of heavy industry. Statless fantasy running on D&D mechanics, spells and items behind the scenes. Strategic conflicts that extend beyond blow-by-blow action scenes. Explosions. Trains, firearms, mystery, adventure, romance! Four female leads with very different personalities. Chapters release at 4:47 GMT+8 on Tuesdays, Thursdays and Saturdays until the end of the volume circa July NEW Cover art commissioned from Jegsuuu!

royalroad_trending.title: Kurnia Chronicles: How I met My Party [Shark Yuri, Action, TRPG]
royalroad_trending.synopsis: Ella wished for the 'Best friend she could ever have'. She got a shark. Shortly after hopping onto a train for the very first time, Ella's life plan went up in flames. The magical school she was going to attend? Shut. Her savings? Inadequate. Her chances of surviving the night by herself? Slim to none. Fortunately this isn't a solo adventure. She has friends. Amantia, the gunslinging witch. Alba, the cybernetically enhanced were-shark. Karina, the fairy druid with her luchador tyrannosaurus companion Hercules. Ella's role? Blaster caster. Surviving the night is one thing, but even a full party might not be enough for what's coming. As coincidence follows coincidence, fate has anything but a normal life in store for Ella. Hired as security for the world's biggest arms deal, there are abyssal plots afoot that could wipe all that hard earned progress from the face of Kurnia. What you can expect: A fantasy setting that has escaped stasis with the rise of heavy industry. Statless fantasy running on D&D mechanics, spells and items behind the scenes. Strategic conflicts that extend beyond blow-by-blow action scenes. Explosions. Trains, firearms, mystery, adventure, romance! Four female leads with very different personalities. Chapters release at 4:47 GMT+8 on Tuesdays, Thursdays and Saturdays until the end of the volume circa July NEW Cover art commissioned from Jegsuuu!

Until then he will just have to do his best to outwit or outrun the horrors most other sane adventurers avoid.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Savage Divinity
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: A modern man finds himself reincarnated in the body of a young slave with no skills and quickly fading memories. Follow his journey to find normalcy while living in a savage world, filled with myth and legends, monsters and Demons. In a land where the strong rule, the weak serve, and bloodshed is a way of life, peace is a luxury few can afford.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Naruto: Stormbreaker
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: After getting revenge for his murdered sister, he was gifted with a proper deep fry courtesy of the electric chair. Once he was cooked to a well-done crisp, he expected to wake up to fire, brimstone, screaming souls, torture demons with forked tongues, and the same three Nickelback songs on loop. Instead, he woke up somewhere far less expected. Want to know where? Read the novel. Or, you know... just look at the title. I really didn’t plan this part through, did I?

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: The Demon Queen Wants To Live. [Yuri, Progression Fantasy]
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: Lysanthia, the strongest Demon Queen, spent centuries trying to die.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: The Machine God
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: The world’s evolving. The System is waking up. And it already sees Alexander as a threat.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Herald of the Stars - A Warhammer 40k, Rogue Trader Fanfiction
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: British plumber, Aldrich Isengrund donates his body to science only to wake up in the far future as the last survivor of a Federation experiment.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: What? My “Information Club” is Actually an All-Knowing Secret Society?
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: In the burning heat of Jakarta, Arlen is a broke car wash employee with one last hope, his unpublished novel The Frozen Era. Knowing that nobody reads books anymore, he decides to sell "experience".

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Cyber Cultivation: When Technology meets Cultivation
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: In 2030, Xia Li was cryogenically frozen. In 2532, he woke up to a world transformed.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: The Archmage's Second Life as an Introvert [OP MC, LitRPG]
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: What does a decade-long hero’s journey feel like… to an introvert?

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: The Storm King
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: Leon and his father, Artorias, are the last remaining scions of a once powerful and illustrious family of lightning mages. After barely surviving an attack that destroyed their home fifteen years ago, they now live in the dangerous Northern Vales, a desolate wilderness far away from civilization. But those who want them dead are strong, patient, and relentless, and it is only a matter of time before they find the two they seek...

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Dao of the World Walker (Craft-based Slice of life Xianxia with World Hopping)
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: Chen Yang died once.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: God of Trash [Cultivation LitRPG] From Trash-Tier to the Ultimate Trash! [Five Full Books! 5!]
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: "Hey, wait! I'm not a god, I'm just a guy who loves trash!"

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Markets and Multiverses (A Serial Transmigration LitRPG)
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: When Isabelle and her new friends are dumped into the world of transmigrators, at first it seems like a blessing. Their new status grants them the ability to visit the myriad worlds of the multiverse, grow stronger, and live practically forever, as long as they don’t make a mistake and permanently die. Every world has its own unique aspects, different magic systems to learn and use, and a myriad of interesting things to explore and discover. Each lifetime is unique, and no two worlds are the same.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Metaworld HopeCore
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: The Year is 2032, and AI slop has won. Far from creating utopia, society has become divided by bots and culture wars, creating a world of disunity.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Lost and Found (Warhammer 40k SI)
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: Lost and Found: Living as a Relic of Ages Past. Aboard a Grand Cruiser once lost now owned by a Rogue Trader dynasty with a heavy Adeptus Mechanicus presence. A soul wakes up shortly after the formation of the Cicatrix Maledictum, in a new unfamiliar body with a diverse suite of implants from the dark age.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Aura Overload
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: In a crumbling empire ruled by cybernetic immortals, royal bodyguard Hector Finalis was betrayed, branded a traitor, and left for dead. Two centuries later, his lost neurodeck resurfaces in a scavenger haul, and he awakens in a fragile new body, a relic haunted by fractured memories and a blood oath most in this decayed age have forgotten.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: The Elf Who Would Become A Dragon [Vols 1–3 Complete]
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: They made her conform. She made them regret it.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Surprisingly Enough(NOT), Common Sense Is Overpowered in Cliché Cultivation World
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: Ning finds himself reborn in the world of cultivation. However, as he embarks on this new life, he gradually becomes aware of something amiss. It dawns on him that this realm revolves around a select few individuals, the so-called "protagonists," who endure underestimation and humiliation, only to rise and retaliate following the predictable patterns of clichéd cultivation novels. Suddenly, Ning has a breakthrough revelation: he is an "extra." Freed from the constraints of these clichéd rules that govern the world, he resolves to chart his own path towards immortality, steering clear of predictable tropes and stereotypes. Join Ning on an extraordinary journey as he harnesses his sharp intellect and vast knowledge to ascend to the pinnacle of the cultivation world. Discover how he defies conventions, outsmarts adversaries, and unravels the mysteries of this realm, all while shattering the boundaries of what it means to be a protagonist in a world bursting with limitless possibilities. P.S.: This is a rewrite.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Crimson Eternal: An Immortal Death Mage LitRPG Apocalypse
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: The main protagonist is unable to die. They can be captured and sealed away, but they cannot die. Do not read if you want the protagonist to be able to die.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Princess of the Void: An Alien Abduction Romance [Vols 1-5 complete]
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: To survive as an alien tyrant's husband, he'll need to grab his new life by the horns.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Changeling
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: Magic came to our world. Portals opened all across the planet, releasing mana and dangerous monsters on the unsuspecting population. Wonder turned to horror. Society was on the verge of collapse, until heroes rose to face the catastrophe. Those fearless men and women wielded the power of mana to enter the portal worlds, plundering their treasures and slaying beasts bullets barely harmed. Through their efforts and sacrifices, mankind stepped into the future. They were called users, or raiders, and they became the champions of mankind.

royalroad_weekly_popular.title: Son of Julius Caesar: Rebuilding Rome [Business/Republic building] [Book 1 Complete]
royalroad_weekly_popular.synopsis: I wanted nothing more than an ordinary life—free from crushing debt and the endless corporate grind. Instead, I died. And when I opened my eyes, I was in ancient Rome.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Debut or Die!
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: After a night of drinking, aspiring civil servant Ryu Gunwoo passes out, only to awaken three years in the past in the body of a young man named Park Moondae. Before he can even assess the situation, he's given a mission: Debut or Die! Now, Moondae has one year to debut as an idol or face his doom. Luckily, he's able to snag a spot on the famous survival program "Idol Inc.," but with his skills so low and the competition so high, does Moondae stand a chance at becoming a shining star?

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Shall Master This Family
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: The great Lombardi family was once at the top of the empire. After the death of its patriarch, the fate of the family and that of Firentia, born from a Lombardi and a peasant, fall to ruin at the hands of her useless and cruel cousins. But when she’s reincarnated as her seven-year-old self, she’ll work to protect the family’s honor, gain her grandpa Lulac’s favor, and prevent her own father’s death. In this lifetime, there’s only one way for her to win: become the head of their mighty household.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Vampire's Last Omega
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: After losing the vampire war, humans were downgraded in society as a blood source. The survivors lived in the wild like animals. Alphas and omegas were prized. Teru was a rare omega and the last. After being captured, he retaliates against the alpha vampire who bought him. Prince Kieran has a shameful secret—he can't drink blood... until he finds a human omega for sale. Teru had a choice—will he try to return to his pack or give everything up for a forbidden love that’s more than meets the eye?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Villainess Flips the Script!
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: I woke up inside my favorite novel, not as the protagonist, Luca Winterwald, but as Judith, his abusive aunt and the first character to die—time for a rewrite! I’ll hand Luca off to his loving, long-lost uncle as scripted, and then live my own life far from danger. At least, that was the plan. When his uncle arrives, Luca suddenly calls out, “Don’t leave!” Now, I must protect Luca from impending family tragedy, raise him to become the hero, and turn this villainess’s ending upside down!

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Perks of Being an S-Class Heroine
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: On the outside, Ailette Rodeline is an adorable child prodigy. Cooking, brewing tea, alchemy; you name it, she can do it. But this little girl has a big secret: Ailette is a transmigrator! After dying prematurely in her past life, she becomes a character whose world is destined for destruction. With all odds stacked against her, Ailette must figure out how to survive before her life is ripped from her again. Fortunately for her, she finds her salvation in… an insurance package?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Cruelty of Salvation
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: To Prince Noah Astrid, Olivia Liberty is an angel sent from above. As their continent's first female university graduate, the papers are all over her, and he can finally focus on polo and liberating himself from his royal family. But she has a secret—she's the inventor of the revolutionary Magic Dome who has to stay hidden behind the male name "Oliver." As husband and wife, they may be able to help each other—as long as their cruel society and inconvenient attraction don't get in the way.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The 4th Princess Just Wants To Rot
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Sophia Elise the Eighth is everything a princess of the Imperium should be: intelligent, demure, and terrifying. So when she’s forced to marry the last prince of a dying Dominion, everyone expects a bloodbath. Instead? She lies in bed eating donuts, reading bad novels. To live her dream life, Sophia must gaslight schemers, gatekeep her reputation, and girlboss her way through a crumbling empire…all while catching feelings for the tragic prince she was forced to marry. "I just want to rot in peace!"

tapas_popular_novels.title: Roxana
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Kidnapping, murder, and risqué relationships! Within the scandalous pages of The Abysmal Flower, the downfall of Roxana Agrece’s criminal family is already foretold. So when Cassis Pedelian, the heroine’s older brother, is kidnapped by Roxana’s father, she can either wait for the heroine’s revenge... or take matters into her own hands, since Cassis is the key to her survival. But with deceitful characters on all sides, can Roxana and Cassis trust each other enough to bring down the brutal Agreces?

tapas_popular_novels.title: A Scent Not Mine
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Saffron’s scent gland cancer altered his omega hormonal functions… and erased his unique scent. When the disease recurs and his organ is removed, he is placed on a donor waiting list. Life goes on in Chicago until Saffron receives “the call” that he is matched with a compatible scent gland. He meets the donor’s family, including their alpha neighbor, Timber, who recognizes his mate’s scent from him. Can Saffron and Timber help each other face their tragic pasts?

tapas_popular_novels.title: How to Win My Husband Over
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: When I died in an airplane crash, I thought I'd finally escaped my hellish life. However, I found myself in another nightmare when I awoke in the body of Rudbeckia de Borgia, a minor villain from a novel destined to die at the hands of her husband. Surviving the dysfunctional Borgia family is hard enough, but now I have to marry the man who will kill me! Still, it's okay, I just have to convince him, his family, and all his countrymen that I'm completely harmless. How hard can that be?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Forget My Husband, I'll Go Make Money
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Imprisoned for years, Princess Aristine hides her true nature and that she possesses the Emperor’s Eye—a skill to see past, present, and future that the emperor of Silvanus covets. Finally, her chance to escape comes when her father sends her to Ilugo, Silvanus’ enemy nation, as a scapegoat to incite war under the guise of an arranged marriage to Ilugo’s second prince, a known barbarian. Now ready to take the reins to her life, will Aristine be able to make money to support her freedom?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Baengri Clan's Unwanted Granddaughter
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Yeon was just an orphan on the streets when a man claiming to be her father brought her to his family home. But the Baengri estate was a den of vipers that swallowed her whole, and it's only when she's standing at the funeral of the father she never truly understood that she realizes how familiar this story is. When she wakes up six years old again, Yeon knows she can't waste her second chance. This time, she's going to save her father. This time, she's going to live without regrets.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Villains Are Destined to Die
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: This game’s got me obsessed! It’s like it’s taken over my life... wait—HARD MODE ACTIVATED. No-no-no-no-no! It has literally taken me and thrown me into the part of Penelope Eckhart. Love is easy as the heroine, but as the hated villain, I’m trying very hard not to die… at the hands of my brothers… the prince… a fork… every possible ending is death! This world is stacked against me, but can my wits and insider game knowledge score the affection of these male characters? Or the reset button???

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Awakened A Hidden Class
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: William has nothing. Poor beyond all measure and with no family, the future looks bleak. Until he is invited to begin a better life in a new world – the same world his brother went to before going missing years ago. At the Tutorial for those selected to venture to this new world, William learns each individual is given a Class and Skill to match their natural abilities. Except his Class is different than everyone else’s. It’s hidden, and potentially, could make him the strongest there is. But will this be enough to overcome the challenges that lay lie ahead – and to find his long-lost brother?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Let's Hide My Little Brother
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: When Kyla Vesta is transported to the world of a tragic gay comic, she has just one goal: save her little brother from being ravaged by men! In particular, she has to hide him from Astair (Astelle?), a beautiful and sadistic man (woman?) who kidnapped her brother in the comic and did unspeakable things to his body and mind. Can Kyla keep her little brother from falling into the embrace of a man (woman?) with sinister intentions?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Soul Forged
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Torrin Gray is deficient, and no one will let him forget it. Immune to the radiation energy from otherworldly rifts that killed most of the population, he's incapable of harnessing its power like the majority of survivors and must work as a lowly boneforger, supplying super soldiers with weaponry as they explore new rifts and battle vicious parabeasts within. But Torrin's life is upended when he witnesses a horrific crime and gains an unconventional ability that could level the playing field.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Philomel the Fake
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: After finding a mysterious book in the imperial garden, Princess Philomel not only discovers that the book's villain shares her name, but that other events in the story are coming true too. Now, she believes that she's an imposter and that the real princess will take her rightful place, leading to the execution of Philomel the Fake! So to avoid a tragic death, she has to make sure the rest of the book doesn't come true. Can this fake princess change what's already been written?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Wrong Twin
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Freyr and Aleksei were bound together as toddlers by the Triplet Deities during an engagement ritual. The arranged marriage, which was supposed to bring prosperity to both of their kingdoms, had one problem: the one who was supposed to be engaged was Freyr’s twin sister, Freyja. Freyr now must keep up the ruse that he is “she”. Secrets and consequences unfold as the accidentally engaged couple learn various truths that neither were fully prepared for.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Trapped at Home With the Male Leads
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: After being reincarnated into the body of the novel's wealthy heiress, Cherry Sinclair quickly realizes that the world is coming to an end, but she’s determined to survive the apocalypse, no matter what. Using the money that came with this new life, she devises a plan to create a shelter to hide from the monsters. What she does not expect, however, is for the male leads of the novel to also end up in the same house! Will all of them be able to work together to survive in this chaos?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Legend of the Arch Magus
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: A powerful arch magus finally succumbs to his death after failing to further prolong his life, only to find himself in the body of a young man in a medieval kingdom. He finds out that he is the second son of a Duke, exiled to a desolated town by his own family. Shackled by the notorious reputation of his new shell, he tries his best to develop his domain, implementing new policies and innovations, leading his subjects to prosperity. In this world where magic is undeveloped, he shall once again pave a new path.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Revolutionary Princess Eve
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Princess Evienrose, despite advocating fiercely for the rights of the homunculi rebels, now awaits death at their hands… that is until she is poisoned by her own sister! Awakening eight years in the past, Eve now has one goal: become the Empress and liberate the homunculi to stop the rebellion from ever happening! To do this, she appoints the rebel king himself, Mikaelis Agnito, as her personal knight. But with Eve’s scheming sisters standing in the way, the fight for the crown is on, and the fate of the Hadelamid empire rests in her hands!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Queen in the Shadows
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Fallen noble Elena is manipulated into secretly assuming the identity of Veronica, the deceased princess of the grand duchy. At first, Elena is dazzled by the royal life she always dreamed of, but when the real Veronica returns alive and well, Elena is murdered by those she once trusted. However, death isn’t the end of her story. Elena wakes up several years in the past with her memories intact. Her once-trusting heart has iced over, and she now has only one thing on her mind—revenge!

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Villain's Sidekick
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Niko has been obsessed with the Owen Thorn book series his entire life. Just like the characters in the book, he dreams of attending a magical wizarding school, befriending the students, and becoming a powerful magician. But what happens when Niko actually gets his wish and enters the world of the book? Will he be able to avoid influencing and possibly destroying the timeline—especially when he finds himself in a love triangle between the series hero and villain? And why the hell has the villain made him his sidekick?!

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Perks of Being a Villainess
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Dohee lived as a pushover, died miserably, and was reborn in a novel as a notorious villainess. But it turns out that her new life is not without its perks, as Deborah Seymour is also the richest villain alive. Now, all that's left for her to do is lay low and enjoy her carefree lifestyle... if not for the fact that Deborah is fated to be sent to a monastery! Will this ex-doormat find a way to avoid yet another tragic ending, or will the challenges of being a villainess be too much for her?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Irelina and the Blood Cursed Sword
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: All she wanted was to live in peace without killing. Iris Jin was an assassin for the Fallon Organization. Upon performing her last kill, Iris Jin thought she’d be free of a life of murder, but her leader – a father-like figure – killed her. But Iris didn’t die. Instead, she was reborn as Irelina Mercius, the 9th Concubine of the Golden Empire of Verticulas. Irelina must discover why she’s been given another chance at life and where the original Irelina’s soul went. For, as she will discover, the fate of the entire world hinges on it.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Prince of Fire and Ash
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: In a world where dragons determine destiny, Markus faces rejection from the very creatures he's meant to bond with and forfeits his noble birthright to his twin sister, Katrina. But on her first tour as the heir apparent, Markus secretly takes her place to spare her from the advances of a vile prince. Amidst court politics, Markus finds solace in Keyne, the elven captain of the guard. Together, they challenge tradition and forge a new path in a society of duty and prejudice.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Taming the Green-Eyed Monster
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Attractive, charming, and incapable of jealousy, Ye Jun is known as the “Ice Prince” around campus. Jong In is his socially awkward friend, who suffers from speech disfluency (aka stuttering) and has feelings for Ye Jun. Unable to reciprocate his feelings, Ye Jun tries to distance himself only to start experiencing that elusive emotion when a beautiful male stranger appears before them. The stranger suggests they all three date, making change between Ye Jun and Jong In's relationship inevitable.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Duke's Darling Daughter-in-Law
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: When an accident shows Ellie what bullying the male lead, Damian, would do to her in the future, she tries to stay away from him at all costs. But after seeing everyone else mistreat the poor boy, she decides to protect him until he meets Duke Schuetz, his future adoptive father. However, there's one thing Ellie doesn't expect when she helps them reunite: the duke's offer to bring her with them as his daughter-in-law! How will this new plot twist change her fate and the course of the story?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Renouncing the Emperor's Heart
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Empress Jovine de Tristane died at the hands of the woman she hated, her husband’s mistress. Then she awakens. Hurled into the past, where her husband and mistress have only begun their affair, the Empress now has a second chance — at bloody revenge! Except second chances rarely go according to plan. And the reappearance of lost magic and a rising rebellion throw Jovine’s plans into chaos…as does a new suitor and her husband’s unexpected obsession with her sudden change of heart. Will all this drive Jovine towards love or is fate an inevitable curse?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Bad Moon
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Surviving a wolf attack in a cemetery, Jaylin Maxwell finds himself entangled with the mysterious public figure, Quentin Bronx. After a series of stalkings from wolves, Jaylin seeks out Quentin for answers, and finds more than he bargained for. His ties to Quentin reveal a dangerous truth: there is a monster inside Jaylin, and the wolves of the East are coming for him.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Second Life Ranker
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Yeon-woo's twin brother disappeared five years ago, only for his pocket watch to suddenly fall into Yeon-woo's hands. Inside, Yeon-woo found a hidden message: "By the time you hear this, I will already be dead..." His brother, a talented genius, had been betrayed while climbing Obelisk, the Tower of the Sun God, a world where several universes and dimensions intersect. After learning the truth, Yeon-woo sets out on a quest for vengeance – he faces off against a Tower almost like a world unto itself, filled with dangerous factions, jealous rivals, and ancient plots. But he has a secret advantage: the pocket watch has stored the memories from his brother’s climb, with all the recollections of meeting extinct species and secret treasures. Will it be enough to defeat his brother’s enemies to reach the top of the tower?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Leveling Up In A Deadly Contest...With My Co-Workers?!
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Congratulations Milly Hawthorn! Welcome to the God Contest! Are you tired of living paycheck to paycheck in a dead-end job? Are you sick of your heartless boss and crazy coworkers? Do you wish something would finally change in your depressing little life? Well good news! You’ve just been transported to God Contest World. A place of limitless potential, where fantastic powers are only a few monster corpses away—unless they kill you first, of course. Still better than surviving in corporate America, right? There’s just one small catch… That dead-end job? Your heartless boss? Those crazy coworkers? They’re all coming with you! And if you thought dangerous monsters and insane gods were bad, try a power-hungry CEO on superpower steroids! Okay, so maybe it’s not good news. Benefit: You can make some friends! How about an obsessed gamer, your office bully, and a dangerously creative barista? And have you thought about reinventing yourself? You’d make a wonderful witch!

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Fantasie of a Stepmother
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: When Marchioness Shuri von Neuschwanstein is widowed at the age of sixteen, she is left to raise her husband’s four children and manage his estate until the eldest son inherits it on his wedding day. She earns a terrible reputation as she does what it takes to survive and is heartbroken when she is asked not to attend the wedding. Shuri flees the estate and dies, only to awaken on the day of her husband’s funeral. With a chance to try again, Shuri vows to make things right.

tapas_popular_novels.title: My Farm by the Palace
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: When Hazel Mayfield is sent to live with the Martins as a child, she falls in love with rural life and vows to have a farm of her own one day. Eleven years later, she receives an unexpected windfall as her grandfather hands her the deed to a plot of land in the middle of the capital. Ecstatic, Hazel sets out to realize her longtime dream of becoming a farmer. There’s only one problem: Her new farm is right next to the imperial palace! And it seems the emperor himself has his eye on her land…

tapas_popular_novels.title: Wicked Ones
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: With a war looming, mortals and fae battle together to stop the destruction of their realms. A draft begins and William Vandervult, at the young age of sixteen, goes to war. Now a combat medic hiding a plethora of wicked secrets, William has learned to survive in a grim world of maggots, bloodshed, and death. Nicholas Darkmoon, a fae with an affinity for fearsome magic, does not find this war rattled reality so grim, but an adventure to celebrate. When the arrogant Nicholas causes trouble, William doesn’t hesitate to call him out. However, through threats of disembowelment and survival on the run, Nicholas’ anger towards William shifts from deadly to voracious and obsessive. And William learns that tasting a little forbidden fruit in the twilight hours eases the slow decay of war from his rattled mind. The hunger these men have for each other may keep them warm at night, but in the cold trenches of war, affection blossoms, evil stirs, and a shadow looms ever closer.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Safest Place
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Tristan had been picked on for being gay since before his classmates even knew what it meant. Now a high school junior, he's convinced there’s nothing he can do to escape their taunts and torments. Marcos is the scariest guy at East High. He was expelled from his previous school for fighting. Rumors abound as to what exactly happened there. The only time he lets his guard down is around his younger brother Santi. Quite by accident, Tristan discovers that if he sticks close to Marcos the bullies leave him alone. Tristan’s bully-prevention plans are complicated, however, when he develops a serious crush on his protector. Ultimately the safest place to be is either very close, or very very far away.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Little Lady Behind the Scenes
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Julianne is as close to perfect as it gets: she’s got looks, talent, and smarts. The only problem is she has terrible taste in men! That’s why her little sister Lilianne is doing everything she can to make sure she doesn’t end up with the wrong guy. However, Julianne’s suitors are quickly catching on that the way to her heart is through Lilianne’s sweet tooth! How far will Lilianne go to set her sister up with the right man? Who will be the sweetest suitor?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Into the Light, Once Again
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Princess Alisa of Edenverre was cruelly executed by her own family for a crime she didn’t commit. She is then reincarnated as baby Aisha, the only princess of the Elmire Empire and Edenverre’s formidable rival. Born into a very different situation—with a new, loving family and the power of elementalism—she begins to heal from her trauma and sets out to discover the truth about why she was framed in her past life and explore the secrets of the mysterious Spirit King.

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Made a Deal with the Devil (Novel)
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: "I don't have enough money or power right now, but I will definitely find a way to bring them all to their knees! I'll make them all beg!" She hissed, shaking with anger and frustration. "I will do everything, anything… to make them all regret… even if I have to sell my soul to the devil!" She said with determination flashing in her beautiful eyes. The man smirked. He lifted his fingers and tucked some errant strands of her slightly mussed up hair behind her ear. "Be careful what you wish for, Miss. A certain devil here might really fulfil your wish and claim your soul in exchange." "If that devil is really here, do introduce him to me, handsome. I would like to make a deal with him." Eva drawled out, smirking back at him.

tapas_popular_novels.title: A Doomed Villainess's Guide to Survival
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Navina Dekarias has lived her doomed life twice. In each, she played the role as the perfect villainess, keeping her bloodthirsty empire's nobility in check with schemes and rumors. Except, in each life, she’s succumbed to the same fate: A bloody execution after being framed for assassinating the prince by her cheating husband and his mistress! Well, third life’s the charm! In this one, Navina’s changing the rules. Starting with marrying the man she’s destined to be framed for killing.

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Woke Up as the Ugly Duckling
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Somehow, Sylvia was reincarnated in a character in the novel she had read before. Sylvia Atlante was called an "ugly duckling" lady character in the novel and despised by her family and others. Not wanting to accept her fate, she finds her own way to live peacefully. However, the situation is unfolding in a way she had never expected. Her family is treating her well and handsome men are showing interest... Why is everybody acting like this?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Infinite Mage
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: A boy of unknown origins and his loyal companions challenge their skills and beliefs as they set to carve out a name for themselves in the Kingdom of Tormia. Sirone wishes to become the best mage ever in a world where magic is akin to science. He must battle through numerous tribulations and enemies across different plains of existence to achieve his dream. Join Sirone's journey into the infinite world of magic, friendship, and self-actualization.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Emperor Reverses Time
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: In the majestic heart of a sprawling empire, the story of Emperor Leonhardt and Empress Elizabeth Isolde von Elysium unfolds. When tragedy strikes and the beloved—by all but one—Empress perishes, Leonhardt discovers a diary that reveals her silent struggles and undying love for him. Overwhelmed with remorse, he seeks out the mystical Witch of the Clock Tower to turn back the sands of time.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Housekeeper of the Dungeon
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Huina Lee is just your average Korean office worker living in a world plagued by the video-game-like System and the deadly dungeons it spawns. She awakens one day as a Metahuman—people who can interact with the System—but with the quirky and novel class of “Housekeeper.” With perseverance, pluck, and a positive attitude, Huina works her way up the strongest Hunter guild in Korea through tasty meals, cozy beds, new friends, and more than a little bit of System-granted luck.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Umbris: Covenant of Corruption
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Brennon is an Umbra, an illegal magic user whose impure power is deadly and only growing stronger. Hiding within Vitalos, the last safe city sheltered from corruption, Bren is hunted by the authorities, rogue magic wielders, and nightmarish creatures. There is no one he can trust… Especially not Ryva, the witty, cunning, and painfully flirtatious demon he summons as his safeguard. Through ancient spells and dangerous legends, the two find their fates intertwined. With Ryva’s help, Bren is desperate to decipher the mysteries surrounding his magic before he’s captured, killed, or worse…succumbs to the corruption that all of Vitalos fears.

tapas_popular_novels.title: My Secretly Hot Husband
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Another lifetime, another hard life—Letitia’s misery continues as her uncle sends her off to the “Monster Lord” to fulfill an old pledge. Imp attacks! The three witches! A hideous masked devil hunter husband! Terrifying is an understatement. But as she becomes the lady of Halstead, the rumors fall apart. Lord Erden is caring, he likes bunnies, and that *gasp* perfect face under the mask! How can he not know he’s HOT? Can she help protect the castle from devils and help Erden see his true self?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Lord Baby Runs a Romance Fantasy with Cash
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Romance fantasies were my happy little refuge. I’ve read countless novels and left tons of top comments in RF forums, and where did that lead me? To getting hit by a reincarnation truck! Now I’m stuck in a zero-star rated story fighting for my life! My father, the vile Duke Phaeraton, abandoned me. I’m barely surviving, no thanks to my thieving uncle, Marquess Tarenka. I’m not even the heroine of this novel! But what’s this? “QUEST COMPLETE. ABILITY ACTIVATED.” Is this my ticket out of here?

tapas_popular_novels.title: OMEGA Magazine
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: "When life gives you lemons, make lemonade,” they said. Sosuke might've hated lemons, but he wasn't blind to a good opportunity. Did he think the modeling job was a good idea as one of the world’s only omega males? No. Did he expect his teenage fantasy from ALPHA magazine to be his Fated Mate? Definitely not. And that said Fated held a secret that could threaten everything? Hell no! But in order to pursue his dream, he must reveal his true self to the world. Which, sometimes, is scarier than meeting your soulmate.

tapas_popular_novels.title: His Elite Omega
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Chiyo is a rare kind of Omega, an Elite Omega. Only one is born in every one hundred babies. They are unique: unable to be marked or impregnated by ordinary Alphas. They can only be tied to a dominant Alpha. Elite Omegas also carried soothing pheromones strong enough to calm even the most violent of Alphas. Suffering at the hands of an abusive relationship with his ex, Chiyo’s life takes a turn when he accidentally meets Lucian, a dominant alpha who hates omegas. They end up marrying purely for business reasons, but love and passion begins to blossom as they learn about each other. Romance comes to a halt when Chiyo’s ex refuses to let him go and past trauma resurfaces. Now Lucian, revealing his true nature as a very dangerous man of the mafia, has decided that he will deal with Chiyo’s ex using any means necessary. Can love still survive violence? [Series Content Warnings: Dubious consent, Sexual Content, Abuse, Assault, and Violence. Reader discretion is advised.]

tapas_popular_novels.title: Solitary Lady
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Noblewoman Hillis Inoaden has had many lives so far (seven, to be exact) but she has always been regarded the same in all of them: meek, submissive, and a pest. But in her eighth resurrection, she no longer bends to the nobles that encircle her, nor does she continue to live in the shadows of her wicked brother and stepsister. With a sacred power passed down from her lineage and the title of Family Head, she sets out for revenge and to change the grave destiny that awaits her.

tapas_popular_novels.title: A Ranker's Guide to the Good Life
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: A word of advice: do NOT under ANY circumstances listen to a puppy-eyed, time-traveling punk who claims he needs your help to save mankind–you’ll never be able to get rid of him. I mean, sure, I’m Jio Gyeon–Korea’s first S-tier hunter, the world’s top ranker, and Sorcerer King Jo...but I’m also the girl who games ‘til 6 and sleeps in ‘til 3! If I can’t even get into art school like my mom wants, why should I have to forfeit my slacker life to save the world?!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Dreamseer
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Dreams have shown Aster a future where his country burns and a killer lurks in the shadows. A future he knows he has to change, even if he has to marry a complete stranger. Now he just has to convince Calixtus—a former knight injured during an accident with a magical artifact—to accept his very sudden proposal. Aster has six months to fix things and figure out who is behind the events that haunt his dreams and to do so, he must learn to trust the man – the fiancé – he just met.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Archduchess's Loyal Shapeshifter
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Rosalin, the empire's archduchess, has a mysterious new lover—Fenrir, a lowborn shapeshifting anthromorph. However, in their classist world, their love can't bloom easily. Turning a blind eye to the empire's injustices, Rosalin showed no interest in anyone but herself. Having never known his parents, let alone his name, Fenrir trusted no one. In a society full of prejudice and hate, can this unlikely couple overcome the odds stacked against them?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Frozen Wolf, Fire Dragon
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Eve was once a human woman who loved to read romance novels. But after being reincarnated as an ice magic-wielding wolf hybreed in one of her favorite stories, Eve runs into a dragon hybreed named Rahel who will kill her in the future and fall in love with her little brother, Sion. Now, Eve thinks her only hope of survival is to save enough money to move to the human world. But as Rahel grows more attached to her, Eve has no idea if she'll cool Rahel's fiery nature or burn in a blazing inferno!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Siren of the Desert
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: He was a cold-hearted bandit with the power to imprison her… Maria disguises herself as a helper boy when Zain, the black-hearted, demonically handsome bandit attacks their prosperous town in the middle of the Arabian Desert and claims it as his own, naming himself sheikh, in search of its riches and treasures and a secret goal precious to his dark heart. To innocent Maria, it's either stay hidden or risk being caught and forced into Sheikh Zain’s notorious harem. She was a raging spitfire that burned through his every defense… When Maria accidentally bumps into Zain one hot summer afternoon, revealing long hair, Zain is captivated and intrigued by the boy who turns out to be a feisty girl. He immediately desires the azure-eyed beauty whose melodious voice rivals that of a siren, and decides to capture and imprison her in his harem, for he must know who she is and where she came from. Now a woman who craves freedom above all else, Maria will stop at nothing —nothing— to free herself from the devil himself even as she struggles against the tempestuous feelings that very devil elicits within her, all while a treacherous enemy plots against them.

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Failed to Oust the Villain!
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Reborn as the daughter of a count she read about in a novel, Lady Valeta knows the story ends in tragedy at the hands of her lowly house pet, Reinhart. Having never wanted him in the first place, Valeta tries but fails to oust him from her house. But when Reinhart’s powerful magic is awakened one day, he kills all those around her, and it is now Valeta who is at his mercy. Though the tables have turned, Reinhart can't shake his attachment for Valeta. He lets her live, but only within his grasp.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Godless Prince
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Some princes are born to rule. Others are born to kneel. Crown Prince Caelum Salutregui was raised to be humanity's perfect weapon—diplomatic, deadly, and utterly devoted to destroying the vampire empire. What he wasn't raised to know? He's vampire royalty himself. When the Ashan Federation offers him as a "peace tribute" to the very monsters he's sworn to hate, Caelum expects torture, death, maybe both. He doesn't expect General Velis Drayke—a sadist in uniform who sees right through his royal mask to the defiant soul beneath. But in the Crimson Dominion, submission is statecraft and pleasure is politics.

tapas_popular_novels.title: My Blasted Reincarnated Life
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: "The warrior Hamel went on an adventure with his companions to defeat the Demon Kings, but after dying just before the final battle with the Demon Kings…. “Waaah.” ‘What the fuck!’ He was reincarnated as the descendant of his fellow warrior, Vermouth. Hamel — no, Eugene Lionheart was reborn with the blood of the Great Vermouth."

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Unlocked the Villainess's Romance Route
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: In video game fandom, there is obsession, and then there is Hanna. Passionately fixated on the villainess Antoinette Delphine from the gaming sensation Love Blooming, Hanna’s preoccupation knows no bounds when it comes to clearing Delphine’s name and fantasizing about saving her from the grim fate at the story’s end. Through steamy fanfiction and online arguments with fellow gamers, Hanna’s line between reality and fiction is in constant blur, until one day, the fiction becomes reality. Tumbling down the digital rabbit hole, Hanna finds herself in the villainess’s game, full of cheesy dialogue choices, game glitches, and magical mishaps. But it’s far from all laughs, as a murder mystery now threatens Hanna as well as Delphine. As the protagonist, Hanna has the chance to live her obsession: she can save the villainess! And, perhaps, she can earn a kiss…or three, turning her fanfiction into fan-reality. That is, of course, if she survives romancing the villainess!

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Prince and the Pirates
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: The quick-witted (and rarely quiet) mer-prince Castian is ready for an adventure. A sketchy deal with a sea witch gives Cas legs and the chance to join brooding Captain Valentine’s rag-tag pirate crew aboard the Scarlet Mamba. Plenty of high jinks and sassy banter take these lovable characters through secret missions and run-ins with monsters—and they occasionally stir up some unexpected emotions. Oh, and did we mention there’s a musical number?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Author of My Own Destiny
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Evil mage Fiona Green was destined to die at the hands of the protagonist couple in “The Emperor and the Saint.” That is, until the story’s author became Fiona herself! Though mistreated, cast out by her pompous family and thrown into the battle at Heylon, Fiona is determined to use her magic for good. But things take a rather unexpected turn when she rescues the male lead, Siegren, turning him from foe to friend… Will she successfully rewrite her fate without changing the story’s happy ending?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Mirror, Mirror On The Wall
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: An apple poisons Snow White, aka Winter von Kastel, and is abandoned in a glass coffin. He wakes up years later in Myrkrheim—the afterlife for malevolent fae souls, ruled by a dark elf ruler. King Taerynn believes Winter to be the key to breaking the spell. The unlikely pair must journey to cursed fairytales and restore the Magic Mirror… or be stuck there forever. Will they make it in time before the Evil Queen finds him first, who will stop at nothing to have his beating heart in her hands?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Become a Star
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: What if you woke up one morning and remembered all 999 of your past lives? Chae Woojin, an actor who will shine brighter than the stars. A story about his journey towards his dreams!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Achilles and the Boy Next Door
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Achilles, warrior of legend, has swallowed the reality that his glory days are over. Now, he’s just Adrian, the physical therapist — and all he wants these days is his paycheck and the privacy to nurse his permanent limp in peace! But his quiet life is interrupted when his rowdy and adventurous new neighbor ends up being Harper, a super hot advice columnist and NuTuber with an uncanny ability to know what people are thinking. As the two clash, sparks fly; is it possible for a man who’s lived a thousand lifetimes to fall in love again? More pressingly, can Achilles survive being the influencer’s new camera guy?!

tapas_popular_novels.title: And so, the Prince Began His World Conquest
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Former delinquent Ahn Yu-An, dubbed the "Confucianism Breaker," buys a fantasy book series on a whim at an old bookstore. After falling asleep at his friend's funeral, he wakes up as Prince Yuan, a character from the book who died before the story began. Now, facing threats from secretive organizations, can he survive in this perilous world?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Hated By The Evil Lady
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Lucien thought he'd have to protect his precious childhood friend his whole life, but he is caught off guard when she suddenly announces her engagement to a man she barely knows. On top of that, the beautiful, proud, and notorious Princess Giselle is somehow constantly ordering him around while making her hatred of him clear. For some reason, she said she hates "second male leads" like him. Is she perhaps... not in her right mind?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Once Upon a One Night Mistake
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: What if Cinderella absolutely hated Prince Charming? Several years and a handful of scandals were enough to make Taliana Avilla forget all about her sworn enemy, Sebastian Phillips. Too bad a one-night stand and a lost diamond ring made her remember all over again.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Kare Means Boyfriend, Dumbass
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Oliver Williams is a loner and a self-proclaimed jackass. When his dad transfers to Japan, he has no trouble leaving his old life behind to finish senior year abroad. Nakatomi Junichi is the total jerk he's forced to share a desk with. They can't stand each other, so of course the teacher pairs them to "remediate their deficiencies," forcing them to spend even more time together. What makes things even more irritating for Oliver? Jun is attractive as hell. Once Oliver discovers that Jun is in the closet, their relationship as rivals begins to change. What will Oliver do when he discovers that Jun is not as much of a jackass as he originally thought?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Mating Season
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: An ancient feud between two rival packs is the reason why Amber lives the majority of her life among the strongest pack in the Northern Hemisphere as the hated Omega, not knowing that she is destined for greatness, for the blood of an Alpha courses through her veins. When she finally finds her Mate, who turns out to be none other than her own Alpha, the infamous, cold-hearted Lucas Blackthorne, she is immediately rejected for being an Omega, but not before Lucas marks her in a moment of heat, dooming them both to a life of insatiable need. Banished from the only home she ever knew, Amber is forced to become a rogue when she meets her greatest ally, who helps her realize her full potential. Six years later, Amber is content with her life as Alpha of a pack that rivals her former one, and is owner of a flourishing—albeit illegal—business. Just when she thinks she has got a chance at true happiness, someone from her former pack is found murdered on her territory. Now, she must answer to her furious Mate who comes barging back into her life just when Mating Season, the time when her need peaks, is around the corner, all while an evil lurks in the shadows, waiting to strike.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Max Level Hero Strikes Back
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: A powerless prince of the Rowane Kingdom, Davey O’Rowane. After falling into a coma, his soul traveled to a large hall where only the souls of the greatest heroes gather. But now, Davey has returned to the world with a greater power.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Immoral Duke Needs to Be Homeschooled
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Reincarnated as a side character in Contractual Marriage to a Dangerous Duke, Estella works as a governess in the wealthy Bertha mansion. She bonds with her pupils, siblings Cedric and Cecilia, and is determined to save them from a tragic fate at the hands of Diego, their handsome but dangerous half-brother. To save them, Estella strikes a deal with Diego: spare the children and she will marry him. After all, a contractual marriage means love will certainly not be part of the deal… right?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Whisper Woods
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: After 15 years Edwin Belle returns to Whisper Woods where his grandparents were murdered. Although he is the only witness, he can't remember how they died nor the three month long summer he spent with them. For so long he has felt a call to return to the forest that holds the warm memories of childhood but never has he gotten the opportunity to return. Now that he's taking a break from work and living in the home he once visited every summer, can he retrieve those lost memories? More importantly, does he even really want to? Because there's something about Whisper Woods, a voice that calls soft and sweet but a darkness lurks within. Edwin is about to venture into a tale of wondrous dreams and wondrous nightmares.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Return of the Dark Wolf
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: With the death of her mother, Anais is now the female alpha of her pack. But, as tradition dictates, Anais must find her mate. And she must find him fast lest the tenous grip she has on ruling the pack completely disintegrates. A tournament is called to test the mettle of all males in the pack. Then Terrik arrives. As Anais finds herself taken by him, she discovers that he may be at fault for – the worst thing that’s ever happened to her. The premature death of her father.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Return of the 8th Class Mage
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: As a powerful 8th class mage, Ian Paige took countless innocent lives under the orders of Emperor Ragnar—a close friend and ruler of the Greenriver Empire. Despite their closeness, Ragnar views Ian as a threat and subsequently poisons him. Using time magic, Ian saves himself and returns thirty years to the past. Now a young boy, Ian joins an elite order of mages to hone his abilities once again. This time, he’ll get revenge on the emperor who betrayed him and reclaim glory as an 8th class mage!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Why Are You Sorry, Darling?
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Watching on helplessly as her beloved husband carried on a whirlwind affair with a beautiful commoner, then dying tragically only to be replaced right away by that same mistress, Duchess DeLov was a pitiful figure... in the book I didn't even bother finishing! Okay, well, I'm not going to live that way. Step one: Ruin his reputation. Step two: Secure a divorce. Step three: Enjoy my happy, rich, single life! ...Step four: Fake a relationship with a handsome stranger to shake off our stalkers.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Descent of the Demon Master
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: He had always wished to live a new, ordinary life. That was his one and only wish. But the world did not allow him to. 'I wanted to live ordinarily, but you're the ones who provoked me first!' Who was the one who provoked the sleeping lion first? It's now time to witness the great Demon Master's reproval of the modern times!

tapas_popular_novels.title: For Better or For Worse
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: The spunky Lady Dillon didn't realize she was the villain of a romance novel until she encounters Marquess Cedric. Seeing him jogs a dormant memory of the novel's plot, in which her beloved younger sister dies in childbirth after marrying Cedric. Determined to prevent this, Dillon marries him herself, but what fate awaits her when she knows he's meant to fall in love with the real female lead later? In this marriage of convenience, it seems nothing turns out quite how either of them expects...

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Return of the Disaster-Class Hero
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: The dead cannot speak. It means the living can create any story they want. Inheritance, honor and wealth can be taken away by lies. However, what happens when a person, who was presumed to be dead, returns alive?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Amelia Thornheart
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: After years of fighting a terrible disease, Amelia finds herself transported into a mysterious world, right into the quarters of a demon captain! Strangely, she seems to have a new body, retaining all the abilities of a game character she spent years levelling in the hospital! However, that character was a demonic combat mage...not the pretty blond woman she's become. To stay safe, she better not let the demons know of her titanic combat capabilities...

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Player Who Can't Level Up
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: I received the invitation from the Tower at the age of 18. This was an invitation that was only sent to those who were qualified to become a player. As one of the Chosen Ones, I even obtained a unique ability, yet five years later, I am still at Level 1.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Primal Soul, Tamer's Heart
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: The magical monster apocalypse happened. Nature healed, and humanity adapted. Now, the world lives in harmony with creatures known as Primals. Raised in this new world, Aiden has spent years saving credits and working with his bonded Primal to become a professional tamer: to compete with friends and rivals, explore nature, and participate in televised tournaments. When a hotshot tamer comes to town, looking for a local wilderness guide, Aiden might get that chance sooner than he dreamed.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Gourmet Gaming
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: A crunchy, crispy piece of chicken. The stretchy cheese on pizza, and eating ramen at one in the morning! I only wanted to eat delicious food. So why is my life in danger because of eating addiction?! There's a place where I can fulfill my most cherished dream of eating everything I want! The virtual reality game Athenae! I'm just eating well but isn't this a bit weird? The Food God's True Worth. [You have gained +1 STR] The Strength stat went up.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Tyrant's Etiquette Tutor
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: It's a tale as old as time: Livia is known as an elegant, cold daughter of Duke Blanche who upholds the etiquette of the noblesse above all else. Croft is a lonely Emperor shrouded in dark rumors in dire need of a proper court education. It seems the perfect match—except Livia, possessed by the spirit of a fiery reader who dropped the novel before reaching the end, is determined to change her fate as an Empress destined to die a violent death.

tapas_popular_novels.title: A Wicked Tale of Cinderella's Stepmom
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: I’ve been reborn into the story of Cinderella, not as the heroine herself, but as the evil stepmother! The real Mildred Vans has worked Cinderella as a servant for the past six months, but I’m going to make things right and raise her like one of my own. Cinderella will marry the prince, but I still need husbands for my other daughters. So why is this handsome Baron hanging around when he’s certainly too old to marry any of my girls? And where is the fairy godmother? Is this the right story?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Solo Leveling
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: There exist portals to another world. These “Gates” have become as commonplace as air and so too have the hunters that make a living slaying the creatures that reside within them. Among these hunters, Sung Jinwoo is an E-rank, the absolute weakest of the weak. But that won’t stop him from trying to grow stronger to provide for his loved ones.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Lady Evony
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Accused of being a witch and a murderer, Evony’s imprisoned. For years, she awaits the day of her execution, her back bearing scars from beatings inflicted by the guards who despise her. But one day, she is granted her freedom and placed into the guardianship of Grand Duke Schneider. Warmed by his doting staff and under his admiring tutelage, she regains her strength and becomes the wild card in an intricate game of power. With nothing to lose, will Evony orchestrate a new future for the empire?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Don't Dare The Devil
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Offered as a bride to the Demon King, Cerise was sold to the devil for her family's greed. Instead of begging for her life, she made a bargain: help her kill her family in revenge, and he could have her soul. Amused by a fearless human, Andras accepted. In exchange, she'd become his wife until her vengeance was complete. But as blood is spilled and bonds deepen, one question begins to rise. Will he claim her soul in the end… or will the woman who dared to strike a deal end up claiming his?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Vampire Hunter D
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: 12,090 A.D. It is a dark time for the world. Humanity is just crawling out from under three hundred years of domination by the race of vampires known as the Nobility. The war against the vampires has taken its toll; cities lie in ruin, the countryside is fragmented into small villages and fiefdoms that still struggle against nightly raids by the fallen vampires-and the remnants of their genetically manufactured demons and werewolves. Every village wants a Hunter - one of the warriors who have pledged their laser guns and their swords to the eradication of the Nobility. But some Hunters are better than others, and some bring their own kind of danger with them.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Children of the Holy Emperor
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Lee Sungjin used to be the strongest hunter on Earth, until he was burned to death by the demon king's flames. He reawakened to find himself in the body of Morres, the notorious scumbag prince of the Holy Empire of Delcross. But he's not alone! The demon king is also trapped inside his head. With his new, unexpected ally, Sungjin gets to work improving himself in order to fit into this world and his new family. Will Sungjin be able to overcome his scumbag reputation and unveil the purpose of his second chance at life?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Dungeon Predator
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: [Class changing to the hidden class, Demonic Swordsman.] [You are the first one to discover the hidden dungeon.] [You are the first one to discover the hidden...] [You are the first one...] [You are...] I'm a gamer who uses ESP. I'll take it all!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Wabah Hama: The Plague
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Fuxiao woke up with no memories of his identity or Bloodline. Survival instincts kicked in when he crossed paths with Topan, a prisoner of war. Topan wanted revenge against the kingdom that destroyed his homeland. Fuxiao just wanted to survive. Thus, an unlikely partnership was born. When Fuxiao’s mysterious blood slowly turns Topan into more beast than human, Fuxiao realized he had his ticket to freedom: a weapon named Topan.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The World's Strongest Are Obsessed With Me
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: In each generation, the four powerful Transcendents are gradually driven mad by their powers until they fly into a violent rampage and must be killed. Dahlia discovers that she has the power to heal them from this madness—but with this discovery, the Transcendents become obsessed with possessing her for themselves. Having reincarnated into this game, Dahlia uses her past life knowledge to try and protect her loved ones from harm–but the story keeps diverging from what she knows!

tapas_popular_novels.title: Blinding Lights
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: It has been nearly three years since GRiD—a fictional Kpop group—last saw the limelight before serving their mandatory military service. Now, they are making a comeback. Minjae as the lead dancer, wants to make sure that everything is perfect…down to the tiniest details. Except fanservice. Especially the part where people expect Minjae and his bandmate Do-hyun to act as lovers. Unfortunately, Minjae has a secret—he once fell for Do-hyun in real life as well. Swearing not to make the same mistake ever again, he decides to ignore his feelings for the time being. Soon, Minjae finds himself in deep trouble when the chemistry the two clearly have on stage starts to leak into real life as well.

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Villainess's Stationery Shop
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: What’s a girl to do when she wakes up in the body of a villainess? Meldenique Babelloa is a supporting character in a romance novel starring her fiancé, Duke Lennox Hessman, and… her sister, Sheria! Heartbroken, she eventually dies a tragic death as a villainess… or so the original story goes. Determined not to follow the script, Meldenique resolutely abandons her old life and sets out to open… a stationery shop! Will she succeed in defying fate and building the stationery shop of her dreams?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Unintentional Villainess
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Renee Blair is an evil villainess—at least, that's what everyone thinks. Reincarnated into the body of the novel's villainess, the new and improved Renee Blair just wants to live out her days peacefully without causing trouble. Unfortunately for her, a pop-up window she just can't ignore gives her a choice: villainy or sickness. Will Renee be able to beat the system this time? Or will she be relegated to the life of a villainess all over again?

tapas_popular_novels.title: Sapphire in the Smoke
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Amongst the steam and grinding gears of Aeras, William Arliss carries a secret that could change the entire world. On the run from the corrupt military, he stows aboard an airship in the hopes of landing somewhere safer. What he doesn't realize is that the ship he boards is the Marauder, a vessel captained by Valkyrie, one of the most fearsome pirate lords to ever sail the skies. With untold dangers on the horizon, the last thing either of them expects...is romance.

tapas_popular_novels.title: My Bedeviled Duke Dreams of Murder
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Lady Aylin Montclair has three secrets: She remembers her previous life, she still possesses her divine power from when she was a saintess, and she wants to find her previous life's husband—the man who ended his own life to save her. But the last person she expected to be his reincarnation is the ruthless Duke Kazimir van Arkel. Kazimir reeks of murderous intent due to his severe lack of sleep—every night he suffers from bloody, horrible nightmares. Not even the High Priest’s power can help him, so he’s ready to give up trying. And then he meets Lady Aylin. His past life's love—and the only one who can break his curse.

tapas_popular_novels.title: I Am the Real One
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: A prophecy foretold that the Grand Duke would only have one water elementalist born from him. Though she lacks her father’s affection, Keira knows she’s destined for those powers. But after years of doing what was right and proper of a noble, she’s executed after the conniving Cosette appears, claiming to be the Grand Duke’s real daughter. But then—Keira wakes up with newfound purpose: make changes, allies, and even friends before it’s too late. Will it be enough before Cosette hatches her plot?

tapas_popular_novels.title: The Dark Queens
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Calypso the Sea Queen wants the ghosts of the dead out of her waters – and goes head to head with Hades over it. The Queen of Hearts dares to fall in love with a dragon. The Ice Queen Luminesa must battle a mysterious evil that has invaded her kingdom. These three – along with Medusa, Persephone and other Queens of fable and myth – must face challenges and dangers that would crush a mere mortal. But they are anything but average.

tapas_popular_novels.title: Life, Once Again
tapas_popular_novels.synopsis: Han Maru has not lived a particularly good life, nor a particularly bad life. He has drifted from job to job after an unfocused youth, and ends up a bus driver before he dies in an automobile accident. But he’s sent back in time to his peaceful high school days with only vague impressions of his past life, given the opportunity to make all the right choices this time and achieve the dreams he wanted to in his first life.

syosetu_weekly.title: 第一部完結 当て馬令嬢リベルタ〜転生喪女はゴーインニマイウェー〜
syosetu_weekly.genre: 異世界〔恋愛〕
syosetu_weekly.synopsis: 入学式の最中、リベルタは自分が乙女ゲームの当て馬令嬢である事を思い出した。 壇上には、将来彼女をゴミクズのように捨てる幼馴染のドS細マッチョ眼鏡男子のフレルトが新入生代表の挨拶で注目を集めている。 前世で彼女を重課金廃人にまで落した張本人から逃げることを決めたリベルタは、様々な人間と出会い、人間的成長を見せていく。 一方のフレルトは、リベルタが居なくなったことで徐々に順調だった生活に綻びが見えるようになった。 今更ながら、リベルタの存在価値を知り、利用しようと近づこうとするが、彼女の『お友達』が、それを許すはずもなかった。 これは、すっかり乙女ゲームなど忘れて日々を楽しむリベルタと彼女を守るためなら手段を選ばないお友達一同のオートマチック復讐劇。 そして、やっと出会えた本気で愛せる婚約者と結ばれるまでのお話。

syosetu_weekly.title: テンプレートが立ちはだかる日常
syosetu_weekly.genre: 異世界〔恋愛〕
syosetu_weekly.synopsis: 超スピード政略結婚をした、天使な容貌の旦那様・ルシウスと言葉が鋭すぎる若奥様・ミュリエル。初っ端のアレはアレとして、テンプレートを乗り越えて仲良く過ごす二人に、それでも各種テンプレートが立ちはだかる日常のお話。 ＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊ 出来そうなので連載型にしました。 詳しくはシリーズ内前作をご確認ください。

syosetu_weekly.title: 45歳社長、転生先でハズレスキル「綻びの目」を武器に没落領地を再建する
syosetu_weekly.genre: ハイファンタジー〔ファンタジー〕
genres: ハイファンタジー〔ファンタジー〕
syosetu_weekly.synopsis: 仲間に裏切られ、会社を奪われかけた45歳の経営者は、過労の末に倒れた。 次に目を覚ました時、彼は異世界の没落領主の息子になっていた。 だが、12歳で授かった神授スキルは、最悪のハズレと呼ばれる《綻びの目》。 人や物や組織の“壊れる前兆”が見えるだけ。 歴代の所有者も、見えるだけで何も変えられず、嫌われ、潰れ、消えていったという。 ――だが、それがどうした。 前世で人の裏切りも、帳簿の歪みも、組織の腐りも嫌というほど見てきた男にとって、そのスキルはむしろ最高だった。 腐敗した家臣、横流しされる物資、崩れた徴税、終わったと思われた領地で、ハズレスキルは最強へ変わる。 これは、壊れた人生をやり直す男が、《綻びの目》と経営者の知識で領地も組織も再建していく異世界逆転譚。

syosetu_weekly.title: 婚約破棄したら速攻で婚約者の父親が出てきた件/おまけ追加中
syosetu_weekly.genre: コメディー〔文芸〕
syosetu_weekly.synopsis: 婚約破棄したら速攻で婚約者の父親が出てきた。

syosetu_weekly.title: 『女の敵は女』だけとは限らない
syosetu_weekly.genre: 異世界〔恋愛〕
tags: テンプレートシリーズ
syosetu_weekly.synopsis: 王宮侍女見習いとして、研修期間を終えたシャーロット。久しぶりに会った友達との会話の中で、「刺激的な」仕事仲間の話題を出す。彼女の常套句「女の子に嫌われてるから」を説明していると、店内で同じ台詞が聞こえてきた。 ＊＊＊＊＊＊＊ 「女に嫌われる〜」の続編に当たります。 こちらだけでも成立するとは思いますが、前作を読んでいただけるとより笑えるかと。 またシリーズものですので、作中人物は別の話で主役を張ってます。

syosetu_weekly.title: 【書籍化＆コミカライズ】双子の妹に殺された姉、二度目の人生は初恋のイケおじ王弟にフルベットします！
syosetu_weekly.genre: 異世界〔恋愛〕
